question: 查询员工ID为25的直属上级姓名
predicted_sql: SELECT CONCAT(s.Last_Name, s.First_Name) AS Supervisor_Name FROM Employee e JOIN Employee s ON e.Supervisor_ID = s.Employee_ID WHERE e.Employee_ID = 25
gold_sql: SELECT CONCAT(s.Last_Name, s.First_Name) AS Supervisor_Name FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Employee s ON e.Supervisor_ID = s.Employee_ID WHERE e.Employee_ID = 25

question: 查询研发部的所有员工姓名
predicted_sql: SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) FROM Employee e JOIN Department d ON e.Department_ID = d.Department_ID WHERE d.Department_Name = '研发部'
gold_sql: SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name FROM Employee e JOIN Department d ON e.Department_ID = d.Department_ID WHERE d.Department_Name = '研发部'

question: 统计每个部门的员工数量
predicted_sql: SELECT d.Department_Name, COUNT(e.Employee_ID) FROM Department d LEFT JOIN Employee e ON d.Department_ID = e.Department_ID GROUP BY d.Department_ID, d.Department_Name
gold_sql: SELECT d.Department_Name, COUNT(e.Employee_ID) AS Employee_Count FROM Department d LEFT JOIN Employee e ON d.Department_ID = e.Department_ID GROUP BY d.Department_ID, d.Department_Name

question: 查询预算超过50万的所有项目及其项目经理姓名
predicted_sql:
SELECT p.Project_Name, CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Manager_Name 
FROM Project p 
JOIN Employee e ON p.Project_Manager_ID = e.Employee_ID 
WHERE p.Budget > 500000
```
gold_sql: SELECT p.Project_Name, p.Budget, CONCAT(pm.Last_Name, pm.First_Name) AS Manager_Name FROM Project p LEFT JOIN Employee pm ON p.Project_Manager_ID = pm.Employee_ID WHERE p.Budget > 500000

question: 查询所有姓张的员工姓名
predicted_sql: SELECT CONCAT(Last_Name, First_Name) AS Employee_Name FROM Employee WHERE Last_Name = '张'
gold_sql: SELECT CONCAT(Last_Name, First_Name) AS Employee_Name FROM Employee WHERE Last_Name = '张'

question: 查询项目ID为3的客户名称
predicted_sql: SELECT c.Name FROM Client c JOIN Client_Project cp ON c.Client_id = cp.Client_id WHERE cp.Project_ID = 3
gold_sql: SELECT c.Name AS Client_Name FROM Client c JOIN Client_Project cp ON c.Client_id = cp.Client_id WHERE cp.Project_ID = 3

question: 查询每个员工的总薪资（工资加奖金）
predicted_sql:
SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name, SUM(s.Amount + s.Bonus) AS Total_Salary 
FROM Employee e 
JOIN Salary_Record s ON e.Employee_ID = s.Employee_ID 
GROUP BY e.Employee_ID, e.Last_Name, e.First_Name
gold_sql: SELECT e.Employee_ID, CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name, SUM(sr.Amount + COALESCE(sr.Bonus, 0)) AS Total_Salary FROM Employee e JOIN Salary_Record sr ON e.Employee_ID = sr.Employee_ID GROUP BY e.Employee_ID, e.Last_Name, e.First_Name

question: 查询没有分配任何任务的员工姓名
predicted_sql: SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Task_Assignment ta ON e.Employee_ID = ta.Employee_ID WHERE ta.Employee_ID IS NULL
gold_sql: SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name FROM Employee e LEFT JOIN Task_Assignment ta ON e.Employee_ID = ta.Employee_ID WHERE ta.Task_ID IS NULL

question: 查询2025年入职的所有员工姓名和入职日期
predicted_sql: SELECT CONCAT(Last_Name, First_Name) AS Employee_Name, Hire_date FROM Employee WHERE YEAR(Hire_date) = 2025
gold_sql: SELECT CONCAT(Last_Name, First_Name) AS Employee_Name, Hire_date FROM Employee WHERE Hire_date BETWEEN '2025-01-01' AND '2025-12-31'

question: 查询状态为Done的所有任务及其所属项目名称
predicted_sql: SELECT t.Task_name, p.Project_Name FROM Task t JOIN Project p ON t.Project_ID = p.Project_ID WHERE t.Status = 'Done'
gold_sql: SELECT t.Task_name, t.Status, p.Project_Name FROM Task t JOIN Project p ON t.Project_ID = p.Project_ID WHERE t.Status = 'Done'

question: 统计每个项目的任务数量
predicted_sql:
SELECT p.Project_ID, p.Project_Name, COUNT(t.Task_ID) AS Task_Count 
FROM Project p 
LEFT JOIN Task t ON p.Project_ID = t.Project_ID 
GROUP BY p.Project_ID, p.Project_Name
gold_sql: SELECT p.Project_Name, COUNT(t.Task_ID) AS Task_Count FROM Project p LEFT JOIN Task t ON p.Project_ID = t.Project_ID GROUP BY p.Project_ID, p.Project_Name

question: 查询阿里巴巴参与的所有项目名称
predicted_sql: SELECT p.Project_Name FROM Client c JOIN Client_Project cp ON c.Client_id = cp.Client_id JOIN Project p ON cp.Project_ID = p.Project_ID WHERE c.Name = '阿里巴巴'
gold_sql: SELECT p.Project_Name FROM Project p JOIN Client_Project cp ON p.Project_ID = cp.Project_ID JOIN Client c ON cp.Client_id = c.Client_id WHERE c.Name = '阿里巴巴'

question: 查询迟到次数超过2次的员工姓名和迟到次数
predicted_sql: SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name, COUNT(*) AS Late_Count FROM Employee e JOIN Attendance a ON e.Employee_ID = a.Employee_ID WHERE a.Status = 'Late' GROUP BY e.Employee_ID, e.Last_Name, e.First_Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2
gold_sql: SELECT CONCAT(e.Last_Name, e.First_Name) AS Employee_Name, COUNT(*) AS Late_Count FROM Employee e JOIN Attendance a ON e.Employee_ID = a.Employee_ID WHERE a.Status = 'Late' GROUP BY e.Employee_ID, e.Last_Name, e.First_Name HAVING COUNT(*) > 2

question: 查询每个部门的平均薪资
gold_sql: SELECT d.Department_Name, AVG(sr.Amount) AS Avg_Salary FROM Department d JOIN Employee e ON d.Department_ID = e.Department_ID JOIN Salary_Record sr ON e.Employee_ID = sr.Employee_ID GROUP BY d.Department_ID, d.Department_Name

question: 查询项目经理ID为5的所有任务名称
predicted_sql: SELECT t.Task_name FROM Task t JOIN Project p ON t.Project_ID = p.Project_ID WHERE p.Project_Manager_ID = 5
gold_sql: SELECT t.Task_name FROM Task t JOIN Project p ON t.Project_ID = p.Project_ID WHERE p.Project_Manager_ID = 5
